name: typescript-vitest
description: TypeScript and Vitest assistant plugin for focused test authoring, coverage-gap checks, and verification after behavior-affecting code changes.

interface.shortDescription: Focused Vitest test authoring for TypeScript changes.
interface.longDescription: TypeScript and Vitest assistant plugin for focused test authoring, coverage-gap checks, and verification after behavior-affecting code changes. Helps Codex decide when tests are needed, add targeted Vitest coverage, avoid weak assertions, and run the narrowest useful validation.
